title: zornia puberula
intro: Zornia puberula is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the hairy zornia or hairy buttonweed. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and is believed to have antioxidant and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and protect the skin. In herbal preparations, Zornia puberula is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its health benefits.
